summary: V55.0 OmniCore Final Sweep Testing Complete. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). All V55.0 features verified: Resonance API with φ-scaling (1 still = x1.0, 2 = x1.618, 3 = x2.618), Masonry materials/gifting endpoints, Ghost trails with is_still/stillness_s parameters, SpatialRouter with 149 route mappings (>100 verified). Frontend pages render with transparent backgrounds (no opaque #0a0a12).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V55.0 OmniCore Final Sweep fully verified. NEW features working: 1) Resonance API - GET /api/resonance/{room} returns score/multiplier/level, POST /api/resonance/record records high resonance events. φ-scaling verified: 1 still user = score 10 (x1.0), 2 users = score 32.4 (x1.618), 3 users = score 78.5 (x2.618). 2) Masonry API - GET /api/masonry/materials/{room} returns craftable sparks, POST /api/masonry/gift-spark allows blessing sparks to another user. 3) Ghost trails update accepts is_still and stillness_s parameters, GET returns resonance field. 4) SpatialRouter has 149 route mappings (>100 verified). 5) CSS batch purge confirmed - .immersive-page and all pages use transparent backgrounds. Ghost trails layer (data-testid='ghost-trails-layer') found on pages. Resonance indicator (data-testid='resonance-indicator') only visible when resonance > 0 (requires stillness).

tests_executed.details: Health OK, Resonance empty room, Resonance 1 still user (score 10, x1.0, centered), Resonance 2 still users (score 32.4, x1.618, attuned), Resonance 3 still users (score 78.5, x2.618, harmonic), Record resonance event, Masonry materials empty, Masonry materials from sparks, Gift spark to user, Gift spark validation, Ghost trails update with stillness, Ghost trails GET returns resonance, Trail includes is_still flag, SpatialRouter route count >100

Oracle page loads with transparent background, Community page renders, Exercises page loads, Academy page works (regression), Breathing page loads with Sacred Breath tab, Crystals page works (regression), Games page works (regression), Soundscapes page works (regression), Meditation page shows ghost-trails-layer
Body background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) - transparent. No opaque #0a0a12 blocking spatial rooms. .immersive-page class uses transparent backgrounds.

resonance_api.get_resonance: GET /api/resonance/{room} returns {resonance: {score, multiplier, level, still_count}, history: []}

masonry_api.gift_spark: POST /api/masonry/gift-spark creates blessed spark in target room

ghost_trails_update.resonance_in_response: Both POST update and GET return resonance field

spatial_router.transparent_backgrounds: All pages use transparent backgrounds via CSS

mocked_apis.ghost_trails_resonance_masonry: Uses in-memory storage (not MongoDB) - this is by design for real-time presence
